import React, { useState } from 'react'
import { Box, Button, Image, Text, Drawer, DrawerOverlay, DrawerCloseButton, useDisclosure, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, Input, DrawerBody, DrawerFooter  } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { HamburgerIcon } from '@chakra-ui/icons'
import '../App.css'

const Home = () => {
  return (
    <>

        <Box id='banner' style={{width:'100%', height:878, backgroundImage:"url('/background.jpg')", backgroundSize:'cover', backgroundPosition:'start'}}>
            <Text sx={{display:'flex', justifyContent:'center', pt:300, fontSize:'500%',height:390}}>Thomas Villaverde</Text>
            <Text sx={{display:'flex', justifyContent:'center', pl:60, fontSize:40}} as='i'>Full Stack Developer</Text>
        </Box>
        <Box id='' style={{width:'100%', height:878, backgroundColor:'#8B5D33'}}>
            <Text sx={{justifyContent:'center', display:'flex', pt:10, fontSize:'500%'}}>About Me</Text>
            <Text sx={{}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. export default Home
